name: Chocolate Sin Raspberry Truffle Brownies
recipeInstructions:
Brownies: Melt chocolate and margarine in a saucepan over low heat. Let cool slightly. In a large mixing bowl, beat the brown sugar and eggs. Add the melted chocolate mixture and coffee dissolved in water. Mix well. Stir in baking powder and flour; blend until smooth. Pour into a greased 9x9 pan. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Raspberry Truffle Filling: Melt chocolate with coffee in the saucepan over low heat. Set aside. In a small mixing bowl, beat softened cream cheese until fluffy. Add powdered sugar and raspberry preserves. Beat until fluffy. Stir in the melted chocolate mixture until well combined. Spread over the cooled brown layer.
Glaze: Melt chocolate and shortening in a small saucepan over low heat. Drizzle over the truffle layer. Chill for 1-2 hours before cutting into bars.
